title: Radical Entities
description: A mod that adds some mobs and items. Nothing too crazy.
body:
## "What's the mod about?"
"Radical Entities" is a simple-enough Minecraft mod that implements more mobs, adding onto the lore of the game and making players' worlds just a little bit more exciting. Hopefully.

## "Any requirements?"
Wouldn't be a Minecraft mod without some, or in this one's case - just [**Geckolib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib).

## "Anything else?"
As you can see, the mod's gallery features only the finest selection of imagery on the site. However, some might find it lacking. If that's the case, you may refer to the [**official almanac**](https://my.visme.co/view/g7d461z8-the-basics-of-radical-entities) for more information about the mod and it's contents.
